name: phase-38.2-baseline
description: Phase-38.2 cross-session recall — memory retrieval that spans sessions.

prompts.message: What decisions did I make last session about the authentication service?
Summarize the last 3 sessions. What were the key outcomes?
Did we discuss adding rate limiting in a previous session?
Show me all memories tagged with the authentication module.
What bugs were discussed two sessions ago?
Pull up anything I said about the embedding cache architecture in prior chats.
Was the quorum threshold I chose last week 5 or 7?
Give me the full history of plan-hardening decisions across all sessions for Phase-38.
Which files did we mark as forbidden in earlier planning sessions?
Recall any architecture tradeoffs I weighed in a previous chat about the intent router.
Did I ever commit to a specific caching TTL? Check past sessions.
Find memories from the session where we discussed the OpenBrain queue drain.
